goals.title: Skeleton, docs, and safety invariants
goals.objective: Create Python package skeleton, market-comparison documentation, and static safety tests blocking broker/network/credential/live-order pathways. Evidence: files exist and static safety tests pass.
goals.evidence: Team plus leader evidence completed G001-skeleton-docs-safety in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: offline-only package/docs/safety/data/domain/strategy/backtest/metrics/validation/report/CLI scope implemented; final tests/reviews pass; commit d49f7f5.

goals.title: Data/domain/strategy core
goals.objective: Implement immutable domain models, strict CSV loader, moving-average crossover strategy, and momentum strategy with no look-ahead signal behavior. Evidence: data/model/strategy tests pass.
goals.evidence: Team plus leader evidence completed G002-data-domain-strategies in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: offline-only package/docs/safety/data/domain/strategy/backtest/metrics/validation/report/CLI scope implemented; final tests/reviews pass; commit d49f7f5.

goals.title: Backtest engine and metrics
goals.objective: Implement long-only cash-only next-bar-open backtest engine with commission/slippage, trade ledger, equity curve, and metrics including max drawdown, returns, win rate, turnover, Sharpe-like risk measure, and benchmark comparison. Evidence: accounting/metrics tests pass.
goals.evidence: Team plus leader evidence completed G003-backtest-engine-metrics in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: offline-only package/docs/safety/data/domain/strategy/backtest/metrics/validation/report/CLI scope implemented; final tests/reviews pass; commit d49f7f5.

goals.title: Validation, reports, and CLI
goals.objective: Implement train/test and walk-forward validation, markdown/JSON reporting with caveats/disqualification flags, and CLI fixture smoke path. Evidence: CLI smoke generates reports; report tests pass.
goals.evidence: Team plus leader evidence completed G004-validation-reports-cli in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: offline-only package/docs/safety/data/domain/strategy/backtest/metrics/validation/report/CLI scope implemented; final tests/reviews pass; commit d49f7f5.

goals.title: Final verification, cleanup, and review
goals.objective: Run full pytest/static checks, run cleanup/no-op anti-slop pass, independent code/architecture review, and checkpoint completion evidence. Evidence: tests pass; review artifacts approve or blockers are recorded.
goals.evidence: Final gate complete for .omx/ultragoal G005: ai-slop-cleaner passed; full verification passed (20 pytest tests, ruff, mypy src/tests, compileall, tabnanny, CLI smoke, forbidden-token scan); independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR; commit d49f7f5.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json for the stock auto-trading bot MVP, under the approved RALPLAN constraints: offline/local-simulator-only, no live orders, no broker SDKs/network/credentials, robust tests/reports/review, and ledger evidence in .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl.
codexObjectiveAliases: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
